pi_items.source: Found in task_description and explicitly inserted into Moodle by scripts/setup_moodle.sh via PHP CLI.
Found in task_description and explicitly inserted into Moodle by scripts/setup_moodle.sh via PHP CLI.
Task description requests 'Weighted mean of grades'. Moodle uses internal aggregation code 10 for this setting, which is correctly checked by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
Explicitly defined in the task description as a required category name to be created.

Explicitly defined in the task description as the required weight for Lab Reports, checked by verifier.py logic.
Explicitly defined in the task description as the required weight for Exams, checked by verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Moodle instance populated by setup scripts. The target course is 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101). The agent is required to set the root category aggregation method to 'Weighted mean of grades' (internal Moodle code 10) and create two categories: 'Lab Reports' (weight 40) and 'Exams' (weight 60), which exactly match the task description and verifier constraints.
